summary: New `run` command (internal/cli/run.go): runs an Actor, optionally waits/polls to terminal status, fetches + normalizes + persists dataset items, and with --only-new emits only items whose hash is absent from the local store. Prints a p50/p90 cost projection before the run; --max-cost aborts pre-flight when the projection exceeds budget. --format json|markdown|raw. Dataset fetch pages through offset pagination (1000/page, 50-page cap) and path-escapes the dataset ID.
rationale: Novelty diffing (the #1 transcendence feature) and cost-aware runs require local state the generator does not produce.
